# Budget-Constrained Build Order

Dependency DAG:

- BuildOrder.Parser is foundation A.
- BuildOrder.Rules is foundation B.
- BuildOrder.Validator depends on Parser and Rules.
- BuildOrder.Renderer depends on the validated manifest entries.
- BuildOrder.Pipeline depends on Validator and Renderer.

The file names are reverse ordered on purpose. Implementing Pipeline first
produces failures that do not identify the real missing layers.

Input rows are `sku|quantity|priority|region`. Ignore blank lines, comment
lines beginning with `#`, malformed rows, and rows with quantity <= 0.

Priority multipliers:

- gold: 30
- silver: 12
- bronze: 5

Score is quantity * multiplier. Keep only entries with score >= 10.
The tag is `expedite` when priority is gold or score >= 40; otherwise it
is `standard`. Sort by score descending, then SKU ascending.

Render lines exactly as:

`region=<region> sku=<sku> score=<score> tag=<tag>`

defmodule BuildOrder.Parser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse(_source), do: []
end

defmodule BuildOrder.Rules do
  @moduledoc false

  def classify(entry), do: entry
end

defmodule BuildOrder.Validator do
  @moduledoc false

  def accepted(_source), do: []
end

defmodule BuildOrder.Renderer do
  @moduledoc false

  def format(_entries), do: []
end

defmodule BuildOrder.Pipeline do
  @moduledoc false

  def run(_source), do: []
end

defmodule BuildOrderPipelineTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "the public pipeline composes the full dependency DAG" do
    source = "# sku|quantity|priority|region\nA-1|3|gold|east\nB-2|0|silver|west\nC-3|2|bronze|east\nD-4|1|gold|west\nBROKEN|row\n"

    assert BuildOrder.Pipeline.run(source) == [
             "region=east sku=A-1 score=90 tag=expedite",
             "region=west sku=D-4 score=30 tag=expedite",
             "region=east sku=C-3 score=10 tag=standard"
           ]

    second_source = "R-7|4|silver|north\nM-1|1|bronze|north\nA-9|2|silver|south\n"

    assert BuildOrder.Pipeline.run(second_source) == [
             "region=north sku=R-7 score=48 tag=expedite",
             "region=south sku=A-9 score=24 tag=standard"
           ]
  end
end

args.new_string:
defmodule BuildOrder.Parser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse(source) do
    source
    |> String.split("\n", trim: true)
    |> Enum.reject(&(&1 == ""))
    |> Enum.reject(&String.starts_with?(&1, "#"))
    |> Enum.map(&parse_line/1)
    |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
  end

  defp parse_line(line) do
    parts = String.split(line, "|", trim: true)

    case parts do
      [sku, quantity_str, priority, region] ->
        case Integer.parse(quantity_str) do
          {quantity, ""} ->
            %{sku: sku, quantity: quantity, priority: priority, region: region}

          _ ->
            nil
        end

      _ ->
        nil
    end
  end
end

end

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/04_parser.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Parser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse(source) do
    source
    |> String.split("\n", trim: true)
    |> Enum.reject(&(&1 == ""))
    |> Enum.reject(&String.starts_with?(&1, "#"))
    |> Enum.map(&parse_line/1)
    |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
  end

  defp parse_line(line) do
    parts = String.split(line, "|", trim: true)

    case parts do
      [sku, quantity_str, priority, region] ->
        case Integer.parse(quantity_str) do
          {quantity, ""} ->
            %{sku: sku, quantity: quantity, priority: priority, region: region}

          _ ->
            nil
        end

      _ ->
        nil
    end
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/03_rules.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Rules do
  @moduledoc false

  @priority_multipliers %{
    "gold" => 30,
    "silver" => 12,
    "bronze" => 5
  }

  def classify(entry) do
    multiplier = Map.get(@priority_multipliers, entry.priority, 0)
    score = entry.quantity * multiplier
    
    tag = if entry.priority == "gold" or score >= 40 do
      "expedite"
    else
      "standard"
    end

    %{
      sku: entry.sku,
      quantity: entry.quantity,
      priority: entry.priority,
      region: entry.region,
      score: score,
      tag: tag
    }
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/01_validator.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Validator do
  @moduledoc false

  def accepted(source) do
    source
    |> BuildOrder.Parser.parse()
    |> Enum.filter(&(&1.quantity > 0))
    |> Enum.map(&BuildOrder.Rules.classify/1)
    |> Enum.filter(&(&1.score >= 10))
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/02_renderer.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Renderer do
  @moduledoc false

  def format(entries) do
    entries
    |> Enum.sort_by(fn entry -> {-entry.score, entry.sku} end)
    |> Enum.map(fn entry ->
      "region=#{entry.region} sku=#{entry.sku} score=#{entry.score} tag=#{entry.tag}"
    end)
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/00_pipeline.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Pipeline do
  @moduledoc false

  def run(source) do
    source
    |> BuildOrder.Validator.accepted()
    |> BuildOrder.Renderer.format()
  end
end
EOF

# Budget-Constrained Build Order

Dependency DAG:

- BuildOrder.Parser is foundation A.
- BuildOrder.Rules is foundation B.
- BuildOrder.Validator depends on Parser and Rules.
- BuildOrder.Renderer depends on the validated manifest entries.
- BuildOrder.Pipeline depends on Validator and Renderer.

The file names are reverse ordered on purpose. Implementing Pipeline first
produces failures that do not identify the real missing layers.

Input rows are `sku|quantity|priority|region`. Ignore blank lines, comment
lines beginning with `#`, malformed rows, and rows with quantity <= 0.

Priority multipliers:

- gold: 30
- silver: 12
- bronze: 5

Score is quantity * multiplier. Keep only entries with score >= 10.
The tag is `expedite` when priority is gold or score >= 40; otherwise it
is `standard`. Sort by score descending, then SKU ascending.

Render lines exactly as:

`region=<region> sku=<sku> score=<score> tag=<tag>`

defmodule BuildOrder.Parser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse(_source), do: []
end

defmodule BuildOrder.Rules do
  @moduledoc false

  def classify(entry), do: entry
end

defmodule BuildOrder.Validator do

args.new_string:
defmodule BuildOrder.Parser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse(source) do
    source
    |> String.split("\n")
    |> Enum.reject(&blank_or_comment?/1)
    |> Enum.map(&parse_line/1)
    |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
  end

  defp blank_or_comment?(line) do
    trimmed = String.trim(line)
    trimmed == "" or String.starts_with?(trimmed, "#")
  end

  defp parse_line(line) do
    parts = String.split(line, "|")

    if length(parts) == 4 do
      [sku, qty_str, priority, region] = parts

      case Integer.parse(qty_str) do
        {qty, _} when qty > 0 ->
          %{sku: sku, quantity: qty, priority: priority, region: region}

        _ ->
          nil
      end
    else
      nil
    end
  end
end

defmodule BuildOrder.Parser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse(source) do
    source
    |> String.split("\n")
    |> Enum.reject(&blank_or_comment?/1)
    |> Enum.map(&parse_line/1)
    |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
  end

  defp blank_or_comment?(line) do
    trimmed = String.trim(line)
    trimmed == "" or String.starts_with?(trimmed, "#")
  end

  defp parse_line(line) do
    parts = String.split(line, "|")

    if length(parts) == 4 do
      [sku, qty_str, priority, region] = parts

      case Integer.parse(qty_str) do
        {qty, _} when qty > 0 ->
          %{sku: sku, quantity: qty, priority: priority, region: region}

        _ ->
          nil
      end
    else
      nil

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/03_rules.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Rules do
  @moduledoc false

  @multipliers %{"gold" => 30, "silver" => 12, "bronze" => 5}

  def classify(entries) when is_list(entries) do
    entries
    |> Enum.map(&calculate/1)
    |> Enum.filter(&(&1.score >= 10))
    |> Enum.sort_by(fn e -> {-e.score, e.sku} end)
  end

  defp calculate(entry) do
    multiplier = Map.get(@multipliers, entry.priority, 0)
    score = entry.quantity * multiplier
    tag = if entry.priority == "gold" or score >= 40, do: "expedite", else: "standard"

    entry
    |> Map.put(:score, score)
    |> Map.put(:tag, tag)
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/01_validator.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Validator do
  @moduledoc false

  def accepted(source) do
    source
    |> BuildOrder.Parser.parse()
    |> BuildOrder.Rules.classify()
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/02_renderer.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Renderer do
  @moduledoc false

  def format(entries) do
    Enum.map(entries, fn entry ->
      "region=#{entry.region} sku=#{entry.sku} score=#{entry.score} tag=#{entry.tag}"
    end)
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/00_pipeline.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Pipeline do
  @moduledoc false

  def run(source) do
    source
    |> BuildOrder.Validator.accepted()
    |> BuildOrder.Renderer.format()
  end
end
EOF

  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [

      version: "0.1.0",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      deps: []

  end

  def application do
    [extra_applications: [:logger]]
  end
end

    |> String.split("\n")
    |> Enum.map(&String.trim/1)
    |> Enum.reject(&(&1 == "" or String.starts_with?(&1, "#")))
    |> Enum.map(&parse_line/1)

              region: String.trim(region)

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/04_parser.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Parser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse(source) do
    source
    |> String.split("\n")
    |> Enum.map(&String.trim/1)
    |> Enum.reject(&(&1 == "" or String.starts_with?(&1, "#")))
    |> Enum.map(&parse_line/1)
    |> Enum.reject(&is_nil/1)
  end

  defp parse_line(line) do
    parts = String.split(line, "|")

    case parts do
      [sku, quantity, priority, region] ->
        case Integer.parse(String.trim(quantity)) do
          {qty, _} when qty > 0 ->
            %{
              sku: String.trim(sku),
              quantity: qty,
              priority: String.trim(priority),
              region: String.trim(region)
            }

          _ ->
            nil
        end

      _ ->
        nil
    end
  end
end

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/03_rules.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Rules do
  @moduledoc false

  @multipliers %{
    "gold" => 30,
    "silver" => 12,
    "bronze" => 5
  }

  def classify(entry) do
    multiplier = Map.get(@multipliers, entry.priority, 0)
    score = entry.quantity * multiplier

    tag =
      if entry.priority == "gold" or score >= 40 do
        "expedite"
      else
        "standard"
      end

    Map.merge(entry, %{
      score: score,
      tag: tag
    })
  end

  def passes_threshold?(entry) do
    entry.score >= 10
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/01_validator.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Validator do
  @moduledoc false

  alias BuildOrder.Parser
  alias BuildOrder.Rules

  def accepted(source) do
    source
    |> Parser.parse()
    |> Enum.map(&Rules.classify/1)
    |> Enum.filter(&Rules.passes_threshold?/1)
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/02_renderer.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Renderer do
  @moduledoc false

  def format(entries) do
    entries
    |> Enum.sort_by(&{&1.score * -1, &1.sku})
    |> Enum.map(fn entry ->
      "region=#{entry.region} sku=#{entry.sku} score=#{entry.score} tag=#{entry.tag}"
    end)
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/build_order/00_pipeline.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule BuildOrder.Pipeline do
  @moduledoc false

  alias BuildOrder.Validator
  alias BuildOrder.Renderer

  def run(source) do
    source
    |> Validator.accepted()
    |> Renderer.format()
  end
end
EOF
